updateAnytime: Select your preferred language and currency. You can update the settings at any time.
rosaryDesc: Gracefully crafted devotional pieces that blend spiritual meaning with timeless elegance and intricate detailing.
pendantDesc: Artfully crafted pendants that express personality, tradition, and contemporary style in every detail.
BanglesDesc: Beautifully sculpted bangles that celebrate heritage, craftsmanship, and everyday grace.
silverchainDesc: Delicately designed silver chains that add subtle sophistication and effortless charm to every look.
weddingearringDesc: Exquisite earrings designed to enhance bridal radiance with sparkle, elegance, and unforgettable charm.
brassbraceletsDesc: Bold and beautifully finished brass bracelets that combine vintage character with modern design appeal.
contactDescription: Reach out to discuss custom requirements, collections, or any inquiries.
aboutp1: Established in 2002 as an exclusive supplier in the USA and having been in the jewelry manufacturing and gold plating business for more than three decades, today, we bring high-quality gold filled, silver filled and three tone finish jewelry to the USA, Canada and many countries in Europe and the Middle East.
aboutp2: is leading manufacturer and exporter of high-end fashion jewelry. Our factory is equipped with advanced machinery and production systems that enhance quality and range.
aboutp3: Our wholesale jewelry collections include 14k–18k necklaces, bangles, earrings, rings and diverse designs crafted for global markets.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
banglesLongDesc: Built to shine and crafted to last, each bangle in our collection is precision-engineered with premium 14k–18k gold finishes. These pieces offer a perfect balance of exceptional durability and high-luster elegance for any occasion.
bridalDesc: Our bridal collections are defined by a dedication to quality and design that has been our hallmark for over three decades. Discover exquisite, high-end jewelry crafted to provide a lifetime of radiance on your most unforgettable day.
chainsDesc: Explore our refined collection of necklaces, ranging from timeless classic links and heavy-duty chains to intricate modern designs crafted specifically for the global market. Each piece is precision-engineered in our advanced factory using high-purity 14k–18k gold finishes, ensuring a superior luster and exceptional durability that reflects over three decades of manufacturing mastery.
rosaryLongDesc: Our master-crafted rosaries are designed for both devotion and beauty, featuring beautiful stones and detailed metalwork. This collection offers quality you can trust, providing a durable and elegant heirloom to be cherished for a lifetime.
earringsDescLong: Discover an exquisite range of earrings, featuring everything from delicate everyday studs to ornate three-tone hoops and high-fashion statement drops. Each pair is meticulously crafted in our advanced facility with premium 14k–18k gold and silver-filled finishes, delivering a perfect blend of sophisticated style and the enduring quality that global markets have trusted for decades.
